author.name: Save Standard Time
author.description: Ditch Daylight Saving Time. Permanent Standard Time lets us sleep later for health, mood, safety, education, economy, environment. We’re a 501(c)(4) nonprofit.

text:
NO MORE CHANGING CLOCKS? ⏰ 
The House of Representatives will vote this week on making Daylight Saving Time permanent. If it passes the House, it would then need to be approved by the Senate before going to the President to be signed into law. Basically sunrise and sunset times would be shifted an hour ahead from November - March. We wouldn't Spring Forward or Fall Back ever again. Shown below would be the new sunrise and sunset times in December. Thoughts?
fullText:
NO MORE CHANGING CLOCKS? ⏰ 
The House of Representatives will vote this week on making Daylight Saving Time permanent. If it passes the House, it would then need to be approved by the Senate before going to the President to be signed into law. Basically sunrise and sunset times https://t.co/vtbtFoLrtN

author.name: Matt Devitt
author.description: Meteorologist in Florida | Penn State Meteorology | Husband & Father | Hurricane Irma, Hurricane Ian | Florida Born & Raised

text:
It needs to be Standard Time not Daylight Savings Time, which was man made and no one actually knows why.

The Earth already adjusts for longer daylight due to its oblong orbit, tilt, and rotation.

Daylight Savings will make it darker for a later time in the morning which will have a negative impact on many areas.

You’re not increasing the amount of daylight but merely manipulating its hours.

It’s stupid!

Don’t mess with Mother Nature!
